title: guajava lanceolata
intro: Guajava lanceolata, also known as the guava shrub, is a small flowering plant native to tropical regions. It has been used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the high content of antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals found in its leaves, fruits, and flowers. The medicinal properties of Guajava lanceolata include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which have been used to treat various health issues such as fever, digestive problems, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Guajava lanceolata include tea, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to reap its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function.
